mapper.insert: INSERT INTO breed_image(img_no, breedno, original_name, saved_name, file_path, thumb_path, f_size) VALUES(breed_image_seq.nextval, #{breedno}, #{original_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saved_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{file_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thumb_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{f_size, jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: SELECT img_no, breedno, original_name, saved_name, file_path, thumb_path, f_size FROM breed_image WHERE breedno = #{breedno} ORDER BY img_no ASC

SELECT img_no, breedno, original_name, saved_name, file_path, thumb_path, f_size FROM ( SELECT img_no, breedno, original_name, saved_name, file_path, thumb_path, f_size FROM breed_image WHERE breedno = #{breedno} ORDER BY img_no ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT i.img_no, i.breedno, i.original_name, i.saved_name, i.file_path, i.thumb_path, i.f_size, b.breed_name
FROM breed_image i INNER JOIN breed b ON i.breedno = b.breedno
WHERE b.breed_name LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%'
ORDER BY i.img_no DESC
